Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...So, there's actually something I want you to try, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And this time it isn't just for a taste test.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I think you'll actually be able to eat it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Wait, uh, maybe I said the same thing last time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka presents me with a bento box.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are rice balls wrapped[n]in seaweed inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They smell good. I decide to try one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's edible, at least.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The rice tastes good, and it has[n]just the right amount of seasoning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In fact, I'd go so far as to say it's delicious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hehe, I finally got you to say it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You know how I said I was having trouble with cooking?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Well, I decided to try and find a recipe that even I couldn't mess up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}And after a lot of consideration... I thought maybe making rice balls is something I could handle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}But then I got really absorbed in how simple they are to make, yet still so hard to master.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I made some rice balls today in home economics class too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I know it's a little silly to make something so basic in high school, but it was all I could manage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But then, everyone in the class told me they were really good, though![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Anyways, I've been really looking forward to have you try one, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I wanted you to see how much progress I've made.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Because, I don't think I could have made it this far without you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}But you did though. You taught me so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I know I've said this before, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}When I'm with you and the rest of the team, I'm able to see things more positively.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And I think the most important thing is the feeling of wanting to make others happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}That might be the reason why I made such good rice balls. Because I was thinking about who was going to eat them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 13 3 5 6}I'm the one that should be thanking you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}They say, "Love is the most flavorful spice," and it turns out it was true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 13 3 15 6}Of course! Just let me know anytime you want some.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to really appreciate me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Our relationship is getting deeper...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}So it turns out, there's actually a trick to making good rice balls.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}The first thing to note is while you're washing the rice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spend the day listening to[n]Fuuka's tips on making rice balls.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я вирішив повернутися до гуртожитку...[n]{f 1 1}
